entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.12
entry.content:
Fixed black arks buildings not registering in sanity. Added new in-game hinting for sanity (have not tested in spheres mode). Added missing Dark Elf buildings.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.11...v0.9.12

entry.title: Final Fantasy X v0.8.0
entry.content:
## FFX Apworld v0.8.0
### Feature - Generate randomized equipment per character (@Rurusachi) - Alternate goal condition - Nemesis (@Rurusachi) - Seymour equipment items & logic (@Andrewki44) - Hardcore Dream's End (@EvelynTSMG)
### Enhancement - Excluded locations no longer generate, and are instead local filler (@Rurusachi) - Separate superbosses option to allow for Omega Weapon without Dark Aeons (@Andrewki44)
### Bug Fixes - Fixed Nova & Mark of Conquest exclusion logic based on superbosses vs original arena bosses (@Andrewki44) - Fixed a logical issue with arena rewards logic not interacting with skipped locations correctly (@Andrewki44)

entry.title: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator v0.3.0
entry.content:
- [ApWorld] Added most DLC ducks - [Client] Removed text field character limits
# Note, installation has changed, please visit readme

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.0
entry.content:
BIG update for the project's 1st anniversary! Most notable additions are extra checks from item boxes and shortcuts - but these new locations would be nothing if they didn't include any proper filler items - that's why also "Random Item" at last is a thing (good bye "Nothing" item!). And hey, there are some traps for you too! And qol and bug fixes as well.
Big thank you for everybody who took part of testing the release candidates and reported bugs as well as good suggestions. Shout out to Matty Matt especially for doing some thorough testing. And Raze for working with the tracker pack!
As usual, download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/blob/main/docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * Boxsanity (single boxes or box groups as checks) * Shortcuts as locations * Random item as filler * Frantic items option * Guaranteed items (ensures you get an item if one is unlocked and fits your current position) * Progressive starting position item * Item rain traps * Overlapping start trap * Prevent extra characters if they are in starting inventory * Entrance info in hint info * Option for faster 50cc/100cc * All Cup Tour minimum rank and CC settings * Add ingame text for various things * GP Race Skips in cup selection screen * All Cup Tour requirements when ACT is selected (also accessible via `/unlocked`) * Current kart and characters with their upgrades/items in pause screen in GP * Good and staff times for current course in TT * Add Option Groups * Make custom lap counts editable in Options Creator ## Changes * Trophy requirement is now percentage based (to suit better randomized options) * Improve unlocked command visually * Increase the level expectation for staff ghosts * Raise caps for items and kart upgrades * Raise extra trophy max amount * Handle connection error gracefully (use `/error` to see the latest error) * **Using Gecko codes like widescreen hack is no longer supported** ## Fixes * Fix Dolphin cache problems * This has been the biggest headache for the longest time, but I think now I have found a good solution. The client tries to invalidate the cache in 3 places: when entering the main menu, when entering character menu and as a last resort when pausing the game. * Fix the fireball glitch again - hopefully for good now * Prevent checks in invalid state * The client won't give you checks for doing time trials when time trials are disabled, or other bad states like opening the client during a race. * A lot of little things
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v0.3.2...v1.0.0

entry.title: Crossword v0.0.0
entry.content:
Fix generation edge cases following fuzzing with https://github.com/Eijebong/Archipelago-fuzzer
Docs here: https://github.com/jm771/ap_crossword/blob/main/README.md

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.13.post5
entry.content:
Completely rewrote the .pack mod side of the archipelago and merged all 3 .packs together for ease of use. Fixed bug where checks only sent on connect and sanity checks didn't send. Fixed ancillaries not sending. Fixed crash when loading a campaign.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.12...v0.9.13

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.0
entry.content:
# Changes from 0.8.5
## Additions
* Added support for **Botanics** (@CodeTriangle): * If enabled, acquiring all the information about each plant by collecting drops is a location. * Enable the `botanity` option to use this feature. * Along with this, you can also change how many plants are required to complete **Crocus Pocus** and the three intermediary locations. * Added support for the **A New Home** expansion (@kumquat-ir): * Chests, quests, cutscenes, and shops added by the DLC are all now available as potential locations. * Enable the `enable_dlc` option to use this feature. * A new goal has been added (`diorbis`) that requires the player to descend Ku'lero Temple.
# Changes from 0.9.0 Prerelease 3
## Fixes to Logic
* Added a requirement for **Azure Archipelago Pass** to **Trouble on the Highway**
## Additions
* Added **Cross Gear** shop slots to **Homestedt Weapons**.
# Migration Guide
This is the new stable version. All players should update to 0.9.0, regardless of whether their worlds were generated on 0.8 or a 0.9 prerelease.

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.1.0
entry.content:
Release 1.X.X is here!
New Features: - Achievements for card opening, selling, and grading - New Host.yaml options to limit and disable unwanted functionality - UT support - A redesign of the yaml - Card collection goal - New Deathlink - and so much more! check out [the docs](https://github.com/FyreDay/Archipelago-TCGCardShopSimulator/blob/main/worlds/tcg_card_shop_simulator/docs/en_TCG%20Card%20Shop%20SImulator.md)
This is compatible with any 1.1.X AP client. Find the Latest [AP client Here](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/latest)

entry.title: Dragon Warrior v1.0.5
entry.content: - Update some slot data for better autotracking capability (thanks to @kingdragonite55 for this!) - Patched the chest glitch to not occur (could cause checks in the Tantegel treasury to fail to send) - Minor text updates

entry.title: Minit v0.6.11
entry.content: some entrances that were randomized in ER but had rules on them (mostly just water entrances) never had the rules properly applied, this update just fixes that.

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.5
## Client Changes - Autobuild can now give most georama for current town! - River/Road/Bridge will require more work; there is a bunch of technical stuff I'm still working to understand - Pond/Oasis are a little odd currently in that they won't have water. Leaving/returning or just pick them up and put them back down and its fine. - Dran's Windmill and Parts HD also won't give their completion cutscenes without re-entering the town if the full building is placed all at once. - Fixed an obscure bug that could cause issues receiving items.
No .apworld changes made; works with older worlds/saves

entry.title: Chained Echoes v1.1.0
entry.content: - Added YAML options - Fixed two missing chests - Fixed some other issues with items and locations - Fixed compatibility with Universal Tracker

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.5
entry.content:
# **Dark Souls Remastered Apworld & Client v0.1.5**
## Poptracker support + Bugfixes for auto map tabbing.
### Version update -> 0.1.5. Both apworld and client have updated. * Client is mostly compatible with all 0.1.x generated apworlds. * Auto Map Tabbing functionality between 0.1.4 and 0.1.5 is not compatible. As a result, if you update your client, apworld, or poptracker pack, please update all of them (to v0.1.5, v0.1.5, and v1.1.1 respectively)
## New features: * Auto map tabbing for the poptracker pack (requires poptracker pack v1.1.1 - found at https://github.com/routhken/Dark_Souls_Remastered_tracker/releases/tag/v1.1.1 ). ## Fixes: * For map tracking, Andre's now detected as being in UP instead of Upper UB.
## Special notes: * Map tracking in this version of the client and apworld requires newest poptracker pack due to changing indices. This includes tracking in Universal Tracker (which relies on the poptracker pack)

entry.title: Outward: Definitive Edition v0.2.2
entry.content: fix: no longer specify the max AP version in the APWorld manifest, so that it will work on newer versions of Archipelago

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.1
entry.content: ## Change log + Fix Memine completion

entry.title: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator v0.3.0
entry.content: - [Client] Fixed a bug that snuck passed preventing connection

entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0rc2
entry.content:
I was thinking if this should be a full release, but ya whatever. It took an absurd amount of effort to get this to its current state.
Also make sure Emulation Settings > Runahead is disabled
## Gimmick Lock: - Option to lock certain level gimmicks behind an AP item, this includes: - Jetpack - Jetboard - Polar - Fireflies - Comes with customizable logic options
## Location Groups: - Credit: @seanstan95 - 56 location groups, which includes groups for each level, each warp room, each location type (crystal, clear gem, etc.) - 4 item groups - Not yet compatible with fruitsanity locations
## Bug Fixes: - Fixed many issues with deathlink - Fixed a logic bug where secret exits put the wrong secret entrance in logic - Fixed the client sending many warnings and sometimes crashing on connect
## Known Issues: - Respawning at the last checkpoint without Polar in each Polar level can result in a double-death - Going through a Polar/Jetpack level without Polar/Jetpack unlocked can sometimes just randomly crash the game for some reason (game doesn't like you or something)
### Note: - This version still has the same debug commands available from v0.4.0-pre

entry.title: Crossword v0.0.0
entry.content:
Adding support for puzzles to be bundled in the yaml.
Docs here: https://github.com/jm771/ap_crossword/blob/main/README.md

entry.title: The Farmer Was Replaced v0.0.5b0
entry.content:
For installation instructions, please [see the ReadMe](https://github.com/seadoggie001/TFWR-APMod?tab=readme-ov-file)
## Features
- New option: Early Riser - force `plant` to show up earlier, possibly resulting in a shorter game - New option: Grass Sanity - each square of the farm will allow you to touch grass. Harvest hay to complete. - A new and improved UI to show received items
## Fixes
- Many logic fixes 1. Drones should always require functions as well 2. Misspelled carrot as the plural carrots 3. Increase required items to complete longer locations (make it easier) - Tell the AP server when the game is won (uh, oops!) - Statistics are tracked slower (2 seconds) to prevent crashes or rapid updates
Known Issues:
- Trap items are not working correctly yet - Free Hay does nothing - You may receive many other extra filler items that do absolutely nothing. I plan to adjust them later.

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.1
entry.content:
## Changes to Options
* Added the following new options (@Bluepinkdragon): * **Chest Reveal**: If enabled, shows the category of all chests without having to reach the room chests are in first.
## Fixes to Logic
* Fixed an issue where, when **Allow Booster Grinding** was enabled alongside **Enable DLC**, it would be impossible to grind certain areas because of a lack of **Everlasting Amber** (@CodeTriangle). * Fixed an issue where, when **Shop Receive Mode** was set to **per_shop** and **Enable DLC** was off, certain items in Rhombus Weapons would fail to place (@CodeTriangle).

entry.title: Backlog Expedition v3.0.0
entry.content:
## New in this version This new update brings the support for even more islands, as well as a variety of new advanced options that allow for more customization on your raid.
Previously i would do a release on both the game's github and the AP World's github, but considering some of the new changes, i will only be doing releases on this page going forward. This is also the reason why this version is called 3.0.
## New in the AP World - Added support for up to 30 islands and 25 locations per island. - Included Islands in your world will now be entirely random when Random Island Order is toggled. - Added option for Random Island Order. - Will allow you to have your islands be logically unlocked in the order they are shown in your home menu, instead of in any order, like usually. - Added option for Forcing Starting Island Content. - Will allow you to set what backlog game you want to appear in your very first island! - Added option for customizing the Hint Shop Cost. - Will allow you to set the percentage of your worlds trash you will need to purchase a hint. - Will also allow you to completely disable the Hint Shop in case you don't want it or your host doesn't allow it.
## New in the Web version of BEx - New pop-ups for when treasures are found or the slot is goaled. - Fix to the Hint Shop cost, as well as removing it entirely when set to 0 in your options. - Updated to work with the new changes in the AP World. - This version of the Web application is fully backwards compatible with previous versions of the APWorld, so you can keep playing your slots! - You can still access the page [here](https://www.bex-ap.com/)
## The Console version - With this new update, I will unfortunately be discontinuing the support for the Console version of BEx. This means that from this version of the APWorld, and moving forward, you will not be able to use the Console version of BEx.
## Learn more about Backlog Expedition - [Setup guide](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/setup_en.md) - [Info](https://github.com/Nikkilites/Archipelago-BacklogExpedition-APWorld/blob/main/docs/en_Backlog%20Expedition.md)

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.3
entry.content: ## v55.0 Update - Added new hero Dan D'Monke - Added new map Skull Peak

entry.title: Placid Plastic Duck Simulator v0.3.2
entry.content: - [Client] Fixed a bug with the client not checking what ducks you could spawn on connect

entry.title: Spyro 2 v2.1.0
entry.content:
This release modifies both the Duckstation client (S2AP.Desktop.exe) and the APWorld (including the Bizhawk client). This version is fully compatible with any seeds created using v2.0.1 - Release Candidate.
New Features: - Music Shuffle option - Streamer Music Mode - removes 2 songs that Youtube and Twitch incorrectly flag as matching other songs - A set of improvements programmed by Phoenix - Logic Changes around world warps - An option to remove the Professor’s door lock in Autumn Plains - A new trick to get on the Autumn Plains wall with nothing (“Autumn Plains Wall with Hover”/`logic_ap_wall_hover`, added to easy difficulty and above) - Added ability to shuffle any or all of an extra hit point (not used for progressive health logic), gem finder, and extended Sparx range into the item pool - Lazy Sparx Trap, which prevents Sparx from collecting gems for 30 seconds - New template preset options, programmed by Sonofkrom - Using Generate Template Options and entering the Presets folder will produce a number of premade templates that serve as a good starting point for different play styles
Changes - When trap chance > 0 but no traps are enabled, generation now proceeds with trap chance = 0 - [Duckstation] Added setup warning to disable runahead, which could overwrite cosmetic changes
Bug Fixes - Fixed a bug where Sparx health upgrades obtained while not connected to the server could desync max Sparx health - [Bizhawk] Fixed a bug where dragon shores token locations did not send when they were not required for the goal - Fixed a bug that could corrupt cutscenes in a couple levels - Fixed a bug where Aquaria Tower sharks did not trigger deathlink - Fixed a bug where in gemsanity, 400/400 could flash on screen many times - Fixed a typo in a gemsanity option (thanks to Slumpymaster!)

entry.title: Parkitect v1.4.0
entry.content: Well as usual you find all information at the [mod](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect/releases/tag/1.4.0)!

entry.title: Crash2 v0.4.0rc3
entry.content:
Quick bug fixes
## Bug Fixes: - Fixed warp randomizer not initializing properly - Defeating Komodo Bros and open secret entrances will now correctly sync when connecting on a new save file - Small optimization in the speedrun trick logic rules
### Note: - This version still has the same debug commands available from v0.4.0-pre

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.0.post2
entry.content:
I probably should have made a new version a few updates ago, whoops. Reworked Ancillaries, now the remove item restrictions mod is no longer needed, woo! Removed the boring regular ancillaries and added 100s more legendary ancillaries. (Some of them come with mounts for lords that are not meant to have mounts, I consider this a hilarious feature). Fixed bug where game would reset every load state.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.13...v0.10.0

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.5.0
entry.content:
Added improved UT integration (should no longer need yaml for UT). - thanks jeditobe1 Added poptracker UT integration. - thanks jeditobe1 Fixed user defined boss fights for Myrkul and Wwargaz. - thanks jeditobe1
Recommended v0.5.1 Archipelago mod.

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.2
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Fixed the Soul Type functions using integers instead of True and False, causing the Option to not work as intended.

entry.title: Manual_SkylandersGiants_ThisGuyHere v1.1.1
entry.content: * support for Stable - 20260319 * fixed an issue with a debug message causing errors

entry.title: Hunie Pop v2.3.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld/Client/PopTracker) Added option/logic for having progressive dates - (APWorld) Fixed issue with custom options when set to min or max value - (APWorld) Fixed Universal Tracker compatibility - (APWorld) Changed Default option order and fixed some typos

CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop Installed - Download Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop.exe" is if it asks you to overwrite files click yes - NOTE if you get a game crash when starting the game make sure that in "{huniepop game directory}/BepInEx/config/BepInEx.cfg" the 2nd last option is "type = MonoBehaviour" not "type = Application" APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy "Hunie Pop Archipelago poptracker.zip" to your poptracker "packs" folder

entry.title: Supraland v0.1.0
entry.content: Removed support for Blue ville theft. Bump required AP to 0.6.7

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.10.0.post2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.10.0 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
## Additions - Update to Casualties: Unknown V7.0.1 - EnergyLink and RingLink support [APWorld Change] - You can sell items to traders and deposit the trade value into either EnergyLink or RingLink currency - You can also withdrawl from either currency pool to buy something from a trader - SleepLink support [APWorld Change] - Originally a joke from the Stardew Valley thread, this is the first game to actually impliment this dumb idea - Yes, it is exactly what it sounds like - The AED and Manual Defibrilator minigames now have items when Randomize Minigames is set to Individual ## Changes - The Goal Depth must now be over 1500m for the five extra padding Depth Extenders to be added to the itempool [APWorld Change] - The default amount of Archipelago Items in the template YAML is now 40 [APWorld Change] - Archipelago Items now have logical requirements when Randomize Minigames is on [APWorld Change] - The first 20% or 15 Archipelago Items are free, whichever is higher - The next 40% of Archipelago Items require EITHER Lockpicking or Keypad Minigames - The last 40% requires BOTH Lockpicking or Keypad Minigames - If Randomize Minigames is set to As One, the last 80% is locked behind the Minigames item - These changes are purely logical to help getting these minigames sooner in seeds, nothing stops you from going out of logic in-game ## Fixes - Having Deathlink set to limbdamage no longer causes a lang error when getting Deathlinked - Fixed Starting Inventory from Pool doing nothing (#45) [APWorld Change] - Fixed unique Layer Unlocks still existing when the goal is Escape Overgrown Depths [APWorld Change] ## Known Issues - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed - The "Saline Bottle Recipe" item unlocks the Saline liquid recipe, not the container recipe

entry.title: Paper Mario v0.6.6
entry.content:
## Bugfixes/Corrections
* Fixed packaging mistake of the apworld file, leading to errors during seed generation.
## Other
* Updated the `Ressources and FAQ` docs * Swap links to point to the new Github repository * Update the tracker list * Updated the setup docs * Mention bizhawk 2.11 or newer as possible emulator version * Add setup guide for Luna's Project64

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.1.post2
entry.content:
Bugfixes Added in-game notifications for item's received (sort-of), they don't show if another notification is active at the time.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.0...v0.10.1

entry.title: Manual_FantasyLife_JBtheShadow v1.0.1
Final Fantasy X v0.8.1
entry.content:
## FFX Apworld v0.8.1
### Bug Fix - Nemesis rules were being overwritten several times, causing inconsistencies in it's logic. These rules have now been collected together and set properly. (@Rurusachi)

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.3
entry.content: I hope that's the last pre-release before release !

entry.title: YARG v0.0.18
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the Whiteweek 01 Setlist
## What's Changed * Added Whiteweek 01 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/39
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.17...0.0.18

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.2
entry.content:
## Change Log
### Logic + Travoll mines region updated + Thanatara Canyon - Money Room X: 2 Y: 6 -> Slide only if you have Dagger + Mines - Money Room X: 8 Y: 8 -> fixed + Ulvosa - Money Room X: 12 Y: 12 -> missing slide + Verdazure Ocean - Money Room X: 14 Y: 13 -> reachable going through the boss + tornado spin + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 20 Y: 6 -> Knife can reach this without slide + Verdazure Ocean - Money Room X: 19 Y: 16 -> reverse path + Verdazure Swamp - Bulletproof Pillar S -> removed Vortex blocks + Catacombs -> access rule to the boss area changed
### Other + Other Players traps are shown as own progression items + save random generated trap icons + option open morose and blocking blocks are removed

entry.title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps v0.5.5
entry.content: Fix the connection to the AP server crashing when the `qol` option is False and `quests` is `none`.
